mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_record ( user_id, session_id, question, answer, scenic_spot_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{scenicSpotId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, MIN(question) AS firstQuestion, MIN(create_time) AS createTime, MAX(create_time) AS lastUpdateTime FROM chat_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY session_id, user_id ORDER BY lastUpdateTime DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, session_id AS sessionId, question, answer, scenic_spot_id AS scenicSpotId, create_time AS createTime FROM chat_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, session_id AS sessionId, question, answer, scenic_spot_id AS scenicSpotId, create_time AS createTime FROM chat_record WHERE id = #{id}
